import React from 'react'; import { ChevronLeft, TrendingUp, History, MoreHorizontal, ArrowUpCircle } from 'lucide-react'; export default function GoalDetailsScreen({ goal, onBack, onAddFunds, onWithdraw }) { const activeGoal = goal || { title: 'Dream House', target: 50000, current: 12500, color: 'bg-emerald-500' }; const percentage = (activeGoal.current / activeGoal.target) * 100; return (
{/* Header */}

Goal Progress

{activeGoal.title}

${activeGoal.current.toLocaleString()} / ${activeGoal.target.toLocaleString()}
{Math.round(percentage)}% toward target

Monthly Avg

$1,240.00

Days Left

142 Days

Recent Savings

{[ { date: 'Today, 10:00 AM', amount: 200, label: 'Auto-save' }, { date: 'Jan 28, 2026', amount: 1500, label: 'Manual Top-up' } ].map((item, i) => (

{item.label}

{item.date}

+${item.amount.toLocaleString()}

))}
{/* Footer */}
); }
